name: South Fork State Recreation Area ramp (South Fork Reservoir)
notes: State park entrance fee; trophy trout stillwater south of Elko.

name: Wild Horse State Recreation Area ramp (Wildhorse Reservoir)
notes: State park entrance fee; put-grow-take trout fishery.

name: Cave Lake State Park (shore and launch)
notes: Park entrance fee; small launch and shore fishing in the Schell Creek Range.

name: Truckee River - Rock Park (Sparks)
notes: Urban river access; cutthroat stocked around the major parks.

name: Sparks Marina fishing piers
notes: City pond stocked by NDOW; shoreline and pier fishing.
